data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Rating both directions', but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that both parties rate each other after completion, there are no API reads or persisted state checks to confirm that this rating process is implemented and functioning as required. This leads to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that both parties can rate each other.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
